category_sources: source_facts.description says dnsviz provides tools for analyzing and visualizing DNS and DNSSEC behavior; official README describes DNSViz as DNS/DNSSEC analysis and visualization software.
display_name_sources: Official website and official GitHub README use the display name DNSViz.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides installation and usage documentation; official DNSViz website describes the web analysis tool.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe DNS/DNSSEC analysis, visualization, and diagnostics.
